description: A literary device or technique used to achieve a specific artistic effect in writing.

name.description: The name of the literary technique, e.g. 隐喻, 伏笔, 对话, 倒叙

description.description: An explanation of how this technique operates in a text

effect.description: The artistic or rhetorical effect produced by this technique

example_usage.description: A concrete example illustrating how this technique is applied in practice
